strategy.name: Market Sentinel — 5-Layer Institutional Entry Framework
strategy.description: 5-layer confluence system. All layers must pass before a trade fires. Derived from live Market Sentinel analysis on HYPEUSDT.P. Long bias only — short setup invalid at time of analysis.

indicators.adx: Trend strength gatekeeper. ADX must be >= 25 for any entry. Below 25 = no trade regardless of other signals.
indicators.ichimoku: Macro bias filter. Price must be above cloud (Span A + Span B) for longs. TK Cross (Tenkan > Kijun) must be bullish.
indicators.ema_20: Trend direction. Price must be above EMA(20) and slope must be upward for longs.
indicators.stoch_rsi: Entry trigger. 1H K line must cross above D line inside the entry zone.
indicators.usdt_dominance: Macro environment. USDT.D must be falling for risk-on long entries.
indicators.volume: Confirmation. Entry bar volume must be >= 1.5x the recent average.

long: LAYER 1 — ADX (4H) >= 25: trend has sufficient velocity to trade
LAYER 1 — Price is above 4H Ichimoku Cloud (Span A AND Span B)
LAYER 1 — 4H TK Cross is bullish: Tenkan > Kijun
LAYER 1 — Price is above 4H EMA(20) and EMA slope is upward
LAYER 1 — USDT.D is falling or flat (risk-on macro environment)
LAYER 2 — 1H structure is printing Higher Highs and Higher Lows
LAYER 2 — Price has NOT closed below 4H Kijun ($37.11 reference)
LAYER 3 — Price is inside the entry zone $37.07–$37.73 (Kijun + cloud top cluster)
LAYER 4 — 1H Stochastic RSI K line crosses above D line inside the entry zone
LAYER 5 — Entry bar volume is >= 1.5x the recent average volume
short: SHORT SETUP INVALID — 4H TK cross is bullish, EMA above price, USDT.D falling
Do not short HYPE until: TK cross turns bearish AND price breaks below cloud AND ADX >= 25 in bear direction

exit_rules: Invalidation exit: 4H candle closes below $37.07 (Kijun) — exit immediately
Invalidation exit: 1H market structure break to the downside confirmed
risk_rules: ADX < 25 = NO ENTRY. This is a hard rule, not a guideline.
Price inside Ichimoku Cloud = REDUCED SIZE only (not full position)
Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Catalyst risk within 24 hours = skip the trade, wait for resolution
Minimum R:R of 2:1 required before any entry is valid
Paper trade first — validate live before switching PAPER_TRADING=false

sentiment_filters.note: If funding rate exceeds 0.05% (crowded long), skip or reduce size

notes: Strategy derived from live Market Sentinel 5-layer analysis on HYPE (2026-04-09). Long bias confirmed. Short setup invalid. Watch for pullback to $37.07–$37.73 entry zone with 1H Stoch RSI K>D cross as trigger. ADX 25.2 is borderline — use reduced position size until ADX > 28.
